mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN confirm_time <= expect_finish_time THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS on_time FROM task_order WHERE runner_id = #{runnerId} AND status = 4 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM task_order WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
